headline: Guy's 'Quick Workout' Turns Into 3 Hours Of Watching Workout Videos While Eating Chips
summary: He's now an expert in 'how to work out' and 'how to not work out.' Guess which one he chose.
fullBody: Jake McFitness planned a 'quick 30-minute workout.' 3 hours later, he had watched 47 workout videos, eaten a family-sized bag of chips, and 'researched the best pre-workout' (he never worked out). 'I'm learning the theory,' Jake explained. His gym membership has been active for 14 months. He's been 3 times. The chips are now a 'post-workout snack' — for a workout he didn't do.
